name: Coventry (United Kingdom)
description: A field bearing the coat of arms of Coventry, featuring an elephant carrying a castle on its back.
history: Based on the historic civic arms of Coventry, in use since the 14th century. The elephant-and-castle is a unique medieval emblem of the city.

features.role: Coat of arms of Coventry — elephant bearing a castle
features.symbolism: the historic civic arms of Coventry; the elephant-and-castle is the city's medieval emblem
